，作者加油（真的很喜欢小挂件）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699105257,"group_id":"7287895438420610063","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书本大户","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxEWKWpY7+3mCzCE56sWEuFtCovqWVVUz9a0CaE1jB2W","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8d4191080d454b6b930697bbc246bfb0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532514&x-signature=CKL74gpiYHXsgBYUHfXbQWeSDIs%3D","user_id":"2510920311641396","user_name":"不如门神"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2510920311641396","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775204951,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7287895438420610063","book_info":{"abstract":"【比NPC还坏女主+女强+无CP+无限流+双面人+护短】

“你相比于其他人会更享受依赖型的关系，同时伴有一定的分离焦虑症，独处时心理上的压力会引起一定的生理反应，例如呼吸急促焦虑暴躁等。说的更清楚点，你没办法一个人呆太久。”
　　心理医生坐在对面看着电脑里最新得到的数据，有条不紊的说出自己经过专业水平判断得出来的经验。
　　“真的吗医生？”
　　叶牧语气中满是怀疑，“可我都没有感觉啊，你是怎么看出来的？”
　　心理医生抬起头，扶了下眼镜，看向办公桌对面的沙发，
　　“我一会再跟你解释，你先松开我们护士，外面还有很多人在等着呢。”
　　
　　一个“依赖型”精神病患者，突然被卷入无限流世界中，那能怎么办？
　　那就每场随机抓一个小可爱带在身边吧。
　　
　　无限世界一直有个传言，有位神秘的大佬在暗中招揽下属，试图一统无限流。
　　叶·神秘大佬·牧：什么下属？统什么流？
